mapper.sql: id , material_doc_id, material_code, batch_no, batch_time, owner_id, logical_plant_id, location_id, unrestricted, damaged, inspection, uom, eta, due_date, currency, tenant_id, batch_price, stock_type, supply_type, source_order_type, source_order_no, delivery_no, deleted, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id
mapper.insert:
insert into inventory_supply ( material_doc_id, material_code, batch_no, batch_time, owner_id, logical_plant_id, location_id, unrestricted, damaged, inspection, uom, eta, due_date, currency, batch_price, stock_type, supply_type, source_order_type, source_order_no, delivery_no, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, deleted, tenant_id ) values
( #{item.materialDocId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchTime}, #{item.ownerId}, #{item.logicalPlantId}, #{item.locationId}, #{item.unrestricted}, #{item.damaged}, #{item.inspection}, #{item.uom}, #{item.eta}, #{item.dueDate}, #{item.currency}, #{item.batchPrice}, #{item.stockType}, #{item.supplyType}, #{item.sourceOrderType}, #{item.sourceOrderNo}, #{item.deliveryNo}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updatorId}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.tenantId} )

INSERT INTO inventory_supply
material_doc_id,
material_code,
batch_no,
batch_time,
owner_id,
logical_plant_id,
location_id,
unrestricted,
damaged,
inspection,
uom,
eta,
due_date,
currency,
tenant_id,
batch_price,
stock_type,
supply_type,
source_order_type,
source_order_no,
delivery_no,
deleted,
create_time,
creator_id,
update_time,
updator_id
#{materialDocId},
#{materialCode},
#{batchNo},
#{batchTime},
#{ownerId},
#{logicalPlantId},
#{locationId},
#{unrestricted},
#{damaged},
#{inspection},
#{uom},
#{eta},
#{dueDate},
#{currency},
#{tenantId},
#{batchPrice},
#{stockType},
#{supplyType},
#{sourceOrderType},
#{sourceOrderNo},
#{deliveryNo},
#{deleted},
#{createTime},
#{creatorId},
#{updateTime},
#{updatorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_supply set deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} and deleted = 0
